companyText.text1: Dücker Medizintechnik was founded in 1991 by Mr. Rolf Dücker. A good name was quickly established on the market, as customers were served with the best quality and service. In order to meet customer requirements, the Dücker Medizintechnik warehouse was constantly expanded. For this reason, the location was changed in 1994. The company moved to its current office and production building in Melsungen. An ISO class 8 clean room for the production of disposable medical products was built here.
companyText.text2: Dücker Medizintechnik is a certified manufacturer of sterile and non-sterile tubing sets and supplies the German and European market for well-known manufacturers and set packers. The service area was expanded in 2001. Surgical mechanics were employed to carry out repairs to surgical instruments. This step was trend-setting for our company.
companyText.text3: With its own repair service, Dücker Medizintechnik has become the point of contact for clinics, outpatient practices and external medical technology.
companyText.text4: Since 01.01.2003, the company has been managed by Mr. Marc Dücker as Managing Director. Today we are your partner for innovative medical products.
companyText.text5: At Dücker Medizintechnik, we attach great importance to <italicTag>quality and transparency</italicTag>. Our certificates and downloads are proof of our commitment in these areas. Would you like to find out more about our certificates and downloads? Visit our <linkTag>certificates and downloads page</linkTag> to download detailed information and the relevant documents. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

innovationText.text: Medical technology is constantly evolving and we are at the forefront of this change. Our ability to develop innovative solutions and put them into production has made us a recognized player in the industry.
innovationText.title: Quality, innovation and customer satisfaction

seo.title: About Us - Dücker Medizintechnik: Quality since 1991
